name: CreatePayment
description: Create a new payment. This tool allows you to create a payment with a specified amount, currency, description, and redirect URL. You can also specify optional parameters such as webhook URL, payment method, profile ID, and capture_mode (set to 'manual' for payments that require manual capture after authorization).

profile_id.description: The identifier referring to the profile this entity belongs to.

amount.description: The amount that you want to charge.

description.description: A description of the payment. This will be shown on the customer's bank or card statement.

redirect_url.description: The URL your customer will be redirected to after the payment process.

currency.description: The currency used to specify the amount.

webhook_url.description: The webhook URL where we will send payment status updates to.

method.description: Normally, a payment method screen is shown. However, when using this parameter, you can choose a specific payment method and your customer will skip the selection screen and is sent directly to the chosen payment method.

capture_mode.description: Set to 'manual' to create a payment that requires manual capture after authorization. By default, payments are captured automatically. Manual capture is useful for scenarios where you need to verify the order or inventory before capturing funds.

testmode.description: Most API credentials are specifically created for either live mode or test mode. In those cases the testmode query parameter can be omitted. For organization-level credentials such as OAuth access tokens, you can enable test mode by setting the testmode query parameter to true.
